scope: Build an anchored larger frontier simulation tranche from the 1000-domain canonical frontier and run a medium hybrid checkpoint on it

decision_context.prior_state: The deeper 90-domain frontier checkpoint was the current best quality read, but it was still unclear whether a broader tractable frontier slice could preserve any meaningful signal.
decision_context.decision: Add a repo-local frontier tranche builder, generate an anchored 180-domain slice from the full frontier using the deeper 90 readout, and run a medium hybrid harness on that broader slice.
decision_context.why_now: This is the cheapest way to test frontier breadth scaling without reopening the impossible full-frontier path.

files_expected.purpose: Exposes the frontier tranche builder through the repo-local CLI.
Saved medium hybrid run for the anchored 180-domain tranche.
Ranked readout for the anchored 180-domain medium checkpoint.
Operator-facing markdown export for the anchored 180-domain medium checkpoint.
Documents why the 180-domain tranche exists and how it compares to the deeper 90.

planned_steps: Build an anchored 180-domain tranche from the canonical frontier and the deeper 90 readout
Run a medium bounded hybrid checkpoint on the anchored tranche
Generate the diagnostic, ranked readout, and markdown export for comparison against the deeper 90 checkpoint

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_hybrid.py tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-frontier-export --input research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_READOUT_TRANCHE_180_MEDIUM_2026-03-24.json --output research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_EXPORT_TRANCHE_180_MEDIUM_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Frontier Tranche 180 Medium Export"
expected_checks: The anchored tranche retains current frontier winners while widening domain diversity
The resulting readout is directly comparable against the deeper 90 checkpoint

guardrails: Do not treat the anchored 180 medium run as better than the deeper 90 unless the metrics actually improve
Do not mutate frontier conversion logic in this tranche
Keep the larger tranche anchored to the saved deeper frontier readout instead of hand-picking winners
